## getErrorCode() function

Returns error.code property if the error object has it, otherwise returns undefined.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function getErrorCode(error: Error & {
    code?: string;
}): string | undefined;
```

|  --- | --- | --- |
|  error | Error &amp; { code?: string; } |  |
